title: Items not appearing in MyWork
excerpt: I have items in on boards in workspaces that are not appearing in My Work.  The results are the same on Chrome, Safari, and in the app.  Changing the status of the items does not make them appear.  Changing the dates on …

posts.author: dscelza (Don Scelza)
posts.cookedHtml: I have items in on boards in workspaces that are not appearing in My Work. The results are the same on Chrome, Safari, and in the app. Changing the status of the items does not make them appear. Changing the dates on the items does not make them appear. Removing and then replacing the assignments does not make them appear. I tired adding items on different boards and the results are the same. I did notice that when I added a test item on a board and then changed to My Work, the new item appeared very briefly and then went away. Any suggestions are welcome.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d guess that something is ‘off’ in your settings in ‘My Work’. Have you double checked all your filters?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: dscelza (Don Scelza)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks are working again just fine. I am guessing it was the AWS East issue.
